recommended_next_actions: Recommended next action: review the thin-history enrichment output and a focused remote replay of the new carry-forward surfaces, then choose the next richer personalization or promotion-linked workflow.

required_gates.summary: Build-pack contract validation has not been executed yet.

Prove the smallest end-to-end Codex personal assistant path: bootstrap the workspace, expose the assistant profile and context-routing surfaces, write and read one restart-memory artifact, and validate the pack contract without requiring broad hook or GUI parity on day one.
